title: Nursery Rhyme. XIII. Historical
content:
Good Queen Bess was a glorious dame,
        When bonny King Jemmy from Scotland came;
        We'll pepper their bodies,
        Their peaceable noddies,
        And give them a crack of the crown!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. XIII. Historical"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
